title: Hiring Medical Officer at Jaypee Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Jaypee Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Jaypee Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!
